title: Agrifood Policy Conference [Advocacy Lab]
summary_full: As Europe navigates new trade agreements, including the Mercosur deal, and addresses ongoing challenges in the food supply chain, questions arise over market access, tariffs, and fair competition for European producers. At the same time, ensuring sustainability, resilience, and consumer trust in European food remains a priority.
